about.subtitle: Quick About Bello Food
about.title: Your Trusted Partner in Premium Olives & Pickles
about.description: Bello Food is a proud Egyptian brand with decades of expertise in olives and pickled products. We combine farming heritage with modern food-safety standards to deliver authentic taste and reliable quality to more than 20 countries worldwide.

skills.subtitle: Our Expertise & Skills
skills.title: Excellence Standards in Olives & Pickles Industry
skills.description: Bello Food combines decades of traditional Egyptian expertise in olive and pickle production with cutting-edge processing and packaging technologies, ensuring premium products that meet the highest global quality standards.

cta.title: Looking For a Trusted Partner in Premium Olives & Pickles?

testimonial1.title: Exceptional Export Partner
testimonial1.text: Working with Bello Food transformed our Mediterranean product line. Their Kalamata and green olives became instant bestsellers in our retail chain. The consistency in quality, competitive pricing, and reliable logistics make them invaluable. Every shipment arrives perfectly packed and on schedule.
testimonial1.author: Marco Russo
testimonial1.position: Supply Chain Director, Premium Foods Italy

testimonial2.title: Perfect for Foodservice
testimonial2.text: As a restaurant group serving 2,000+ customers daily, we demand perfection. Bello Food's pickled peppers and stuffed olives exceed expectations every time. Their flexible bulk packaging and responsive customer support have streamlined our operations. Our chefs love the authentic Mediterranean flavors.
testimonial2.author: Elena Volkov
testimonial2.position: Head Chef & Operations Manager, Moscow Restaurant Group

testimonial3.title: Trusted Quality Standards
testimonial3.text: Bello Food stands out for their certifications and food safety excellence. All documentation is flawless, product traceability is transparent, and quality never varies. They helped us expand our organic and halal product sections with confidence. A truly professional supplier that understands international markets.
testimonial3.author: Hassan Al-Rashid
testimonial3.position: Quality Assurance Manager, Gulf Distribution Co., UAE

productsPage.subtitle: Our Products
productsPage.title: Premium Egyptian Olives & Pickles — Crafted for Every Market

premiumOlives.title: Premium Olives
premiumOlives.description: Manzanilla, Kalamata, Green & Black olives in various preparations

pickledProducts.title: Pickled Products
pickledProducts.description: Pickled cucumbers, mixed vegetables, pepperoncini & specialty items

packagingSolutions.title: Packaging Solutions
packagingSolutions.description: Retail jars, foodservice packs, bulk barrels & private label options

descriptions.wholeGreenOlives: Preparing whole green olives is important for their quality and flavor.
descriptions.pittedGreenOlives: Discover perfectly pitted olives with uniform texture and size, thanks to our advanced processing machines.
descriptions.slicedGreenOlives: Delicious Sliced Green Olives - Carefully Sorted and Packed for Quality Assurance
descriptions.wholeBlackOlives: Discover the process of creating whole black olives from tree to table
descriptions.pittedBlackOlives: Pitted black olives, packed for quality
descriptions.slicedBlackOlives: Experience the journey of sliced black olives from tree to table
descriptions.wholeBlackNaturalKalamataOlives: Whole Black Natural Kalamata Olives – premium, handpicked olives known for their rich flavor and authentic Mediterranean taste.
descriptions.pittedBlackNaturalKalamataOlives: Pitted Black Natural Kalamata Olives – smooth, flavorful, and ready to enjoy with the authentic taste of Greece.
descriptions.slicedBlackNaturalKalamataOlives: Sliced Black Natural Kalamata Olives – conveniently pre-sliced, offering bold Mediterranean flavor for salads, pizzas, and everyday dishes.
descriptions.wholeBlackNaturalPicualOlives: From tree to table: uncover the steps of harvesting, washing, brining, and packaging whole natural black olives
descriptions.pittedBlackNaturalPicualOlives: Explore the journey of pitted natural black olives from tree to table
descriptions.slicedBlackNaturalPicualOlives: We proudly offer sliced natural black olives, ideal for culinary use in both home kitchens and food service industries
descriptions.oliveBlackNaturalDolce: Whole Black Natural Dolce Olives – mild, smooth, and delicately sweet, perfect for everyday Mediterranean enjoyment.
descriptions.pittedBlackNaturalDolce: Pitted Black Natural Dolce Olives – soft, subtly sweet, and conveniently ready to serve in any dish.
descriptions.pepperonciniPepper: Mild, tangy, and crunchy – perfect for salads, sandwiches, and antipasti. A classic Mediterranean favorite in both whole and sliced forms.
descriptions.cherryPepper: Our cherry peppers bring a natural burst of color and flavor to every meal
descriptions.kardoulaPepper: Kardoula Peppers – vibrant, naturally sweet peppers with a bold Mediterranean flavor, ideal for stuffing, grilling, or antipasti.
descriptions.wholeLombardiPepper: If you're looking to add a unique touch to your dishes or seeking a high-quality product to satisfy gourmet tastes, Lombardi Pepper Whole is an ideal choice
descriptions.slicedLombardiPepper: Enjoy the bold flavor and mild heat of sliced Lombardi green pepper pickles, perfect for adding a touch of zest to sandwiches, salads, and main dishes.
descriptions.slicedGreenJalapenoPepper: Our high-quality sliced jalapeño peppers are ready to add a bold, spicy flavor to any dish. Perfect for restaurants, food manufacturers
descriptions.slicedRedJalapenoPepper: Our sliced red jalapeño peppers bring a vibrant color and a balanced, sweet-spicy flavor that enhances a variety of dishes.
descriptions.habibaPepper: Habiba Peppers – tender and flavorful with a natural sweetness, perfect for Mediterranean dishes and gourmet appetizers.
descriptions.mexicanPepper: Mexican Peppers – bold and zesty with a distinctive heat, adding authentic spice to a wide range of dishes.
descriptions.macedonianPepper: Macedonian Peppers – rich and flavorful with a balanced sweetness and mild spice, perfect for traditional Mediterranean recipes.
descriptions.artichokeHearts: tender and delicate, offering a mild, nutty flavor perfect for salads, pasta, and antipasti.
descriptions.artichokeQuarter: conveniently cut, flavorful pieces ideal for pizzas, casseroles, and Mediterranean dishes.
descriptions.artichokeBottom: firm and versatile, with a smooth texture suited for stuffing, baking, or gourmet recipes.

contactPage.subtitle: Get in Touch
contactPage.title: LET'S BRING THE TASTE OF PREMIUM EGYPTIAN OLIVES TO YOUR MARKET!
contactPage.description: At Bello Food, we're always excited to connect with partners, clients, and customers worldwide. Whether you're interested in our products, private label solutions, or tailored packaging, our team is here to assist you.
contactPage.closingMessage: Every partnership is a step toward sharing premium Egyptian olives with the world.

whatsapp.title: Connect Via WhatsApp
whatsapp.description: Get instant support and quick responses to your inquiries. Our team is ready to assist you with product information, quotes, and any questions you may have.
whatsapp.availability: Available during business hours • Quick response guaranteed

sustainabilityPage.subtitle: Our Commitment
sustainabilityPage.title: Sustainability, Quality & Trust
sustainabilityPage.description: At Bello Food, sustainability isn't just a promise—it's part of who we are. From farm to shelf, we commit to responsible practices that respect people, protect the environment, and ensure long-term value for our partners and communities.

qualityAssurance.title: Uncompromising Quality & Assurance
qualityAssurance.description: "Happy Customers, everywhere" is more than a slogan—it's our guiding principle. Through strict quality control systems, advanced food safety protocols, and customer-centric service, Bello Food ensures that every olive and pickle meets the highest international standards.

certifications.title: Our certifications reflect this dedication:
items: BRC (British Retail Consortium) – Food safety and quality benchmark
FDA (U.S. Food & Drug Administration) – Compliance with global safety standards
ISO-certified – Ensuring consistency, efficiency, and safety across operations
Kosher & Halal – Catering to diverse dietary and cultural requirements

globalReach.title: Global Reach
globalReach.description: Backed by an optimized supply chain and exceptional logistics capabilities, Bello Food exports effortlessly to Russia, Europe, and the MEA region, delivering freshness and reliability every time.

sustainabilityPage.statement: Innovation, Sustainability, Quality — The Foundation of Everything We Do
